'''tanguzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oenophile|oenophile]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-ng-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oenophile|oenophile]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tanguzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tængizith|tængizith]] || [[word:tængizij|tængizij]] || [[word:tængizish|tængizish]] || [[word:tængizi|tængizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tangunguzuth|tangunguzuth]] || [[word:tangunguzuj|tangunguzuj]] || [[word:tangunguzush|tangunguzush]] || [[word:tangunguzu|tangunguzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tanguzuth|tanguzuth]] || [[word:tanguzuj|tanguzuj]] || [[word:tanguzush|tanguzush]] || [[word:tanguzu|tanguzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tangufzuth|tangufzuth]] || [[word:tangufzuj|tangufzuj]] || [[word:tangufzush|tangufzush]] || [[word:tangufzuf|tangufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tanguzuthu|tanguzuthu]] || [[word:tanguzuju|tanguzuju]] || [[word:tanguzushu|tanguzushu]] || [[word:tanguzuku|tanguzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tanguzuth|tanguzuth]] || [[word:tanguzuj|tanguzuj]] || [[word:tanguzush|tanguzush]] || [[word:tanguzu|tanguzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tanguzuthul|tanguzuthul]] || [[word:tanguzujul|tanguzujul]] || [[word:tanguzushul|tanguzushul]] || [[word:tanguzukul|tanguzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tanguzuthuthu|tanguzuthuthu]] || [[word:tanguzujuju|tanguzujuju]] || [[word:tanguzushushu|tanguzushushu]] || [[word:tanguzuku|tanguzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tanguzuthun|tanguzuthun]] || [[word:tanguzujun|tanguzujun]] || [[word:tanguzushun|tanguzushun]] || [[word:tanguzukun|tanguzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tanguzuthuoro|tanguzuthuoro]] || [[word:tanguzujuoro|tanguzujuoro]] || [[word:tanguzushuoro|tanguzushuoro]] || [[word:tanguzukuoro|tanguzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
